author: imaginaryprogramming
description: Transfers a note from one vault to another.

manifest.author: ImaginaryProgramming
manifest.description: Copies a note, and pastes it into another vault.
manifest.name: Vault Transfer

name: Vault Transfer

releases.author: ImaginaryProgramming
releases.description:
- Adds support for Unix-based systems (#11)
- Adds a new command "Transfer current note to other vault: From list" which allows you to pick any vault so long as they share the same root. (#11)
- Adds "Tag to assign" setting, which automatically tags the original note after transfer (#18)
- Non-markdown attachments which are linked but not embedded are now transferred (#18)

Thank you @Nihilentropy-117 and @pplucky!

releases.author: ImaginaryProgramming
releases.description:
- Changes some of the wording of settings to follow obsidian plugin conventions.
- Changes how a few settings are organized.

releases.author: ImaginaryProgramming
releases.description: Updates the obsidian API to 1.5.7 and fixes a couple code issues.

releases.author: ImaginaryProgramming
releases.description: Changes the package name from `obsidian-vault-transfer` to `vault-transfer`.

releases.author: ImaginaryProgramming
releases.description:
Adds support for transferring attachments. (#6)
Adds support for recursively transferring a folder of notes. (#7)
Adds various options in settings.

Thanks @Lisandra-dev for these features!

releases.author: ImaginaryProgramming
releases.description: Adds the "Insert link to current note in other vault" command. Inserts a link to the current note in the other vault, without transferring the contents. Used when you know a file with the same name already exists in the other vault.

releases.author: ImaginaryProgramming
releases.description: Adds the "Transfer current note to other vault" command, which copies the current note to another vault and replaces the original contents with a link to the new note.
releases.name: Initial Release
